name: Tyro of the Gauntlet
description: You gain the following benefits: Stand as One: When an ally within 5 feet of you is subjected to an effect that would push or pull it, you can take a reaction to prevent that ally from being pushed or pulled. To receive this benefit, the ally can't have the incapacitated condition. Vigilant: When you take the Ready action, the next attack roll made against you has disadvantage before the start of your next turn.
